name: 4 Tier Shoe Rack Black Metal with Natural Wood - Brightroom™
description:
Revamp your entryway or any other space with the functional style of this 4-Tier Shoe Rack in Black Metal with Natural Wood from Brightroom™. Constructed with a metal frame and natural wood top for modern flair, this shoe rack has thin metal rod shelves for an airy look. The three built-in shelves provide enough space to store multiple pairs of shoes while the rectangular top can be used to store your bags and other accessories. Simply place it against a wall in a mudroom or in a bedroom closet to enjoy easy access to your footwear.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
